hero.title: Hi, I'm Tim!
hero.p0: FullStack Developer with Mechanical Engineering Expertise
hero.des0: I am a rising FullStack Developer with Mechanical Engineering Expertise
hero.des1: I enjoy creating high-quality web-based apps with cutting edge technologies behind it.
hero.des2: My technology stack includes Next.js, TypeScript and PostgreSQL.
hero.des3: I am also currently learning more about Software engineering and Devops.

projects.title: Projects
projects.description: Here are some of my most favourite projects that I enjoyed coding and designing from scratch, both with a team and alone.

Prolog.subtitle: React Job Simulator program-error tracking tool
Prolog.description: During the React Job Simulator program, I built features, fixed bugs, and implemented advanced workflows, such as ESLint, Prettier, TypeScript, Husky, CI with GitHub Actions, and Trunk-Based Development, to enhance the ProLog codebase and ensure efficient bug fixing and feature implementation based on Kanban tasks and Figma designs.

Crown-Clothing.subtitle: FullStack Clothing E-commerce Website
Crown-Clothing.description: Developed a robust full-stack e-commerce website with seamless integration of secure payments, routes, NoSQL database, and OAuth, serving as a scalable template for future projects and demonstrating advanced payment integration capabilities.

Smart-Brain.subtitle: FullStack Face Detection Website
Smart-Brain.description: Developed a full-stack project that utilized machine learning to detect faces within uploaded images, showcasing my proficiency in web development and fullStack technologies.

Galactic-pawn.subtitle: Coding Bootcamp FullStack capstone project
Galactic-pawn.description: An E-commerce website with seamless integration of routes, PostgreSQL, database, and OAuth, featuring user authentication, registration, and a fully functional store page for a simulated remote team environment using cutting-edge web development and fullStack technologies.

skills.title: Skills
skills.description: I am passionate about using cutting-edge technologies. These are the tools I am most familiar with and build things every day.

experience.title: Experience
experience.description: Here are some great companies I had the honour to join for working on various interesting projects.

contact.title: Wanna reach out?
contact.description: Feel free to drop me a message if you have some interesting offer or you want to hang out.
